title: Inconsistentize
description: Makes it so that item entities are picked up by a random player in the area, rather than the player in the area who joined the server first.
body:
In vanilla Minecraft, item pickup logic gives priority to players who joined the world earlier.
This means that when multiple players are near the same dropped item, the one who joined first usually picks it up every time.

## This mod fixes that.

Now, every nearby player has an equal chance to pick up items, making item collection fair for everyone!

![Example of fair item pickup distribution](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04d47cdbe4e44246c6f4e8f8d2e410f5a98ec1aa.gif)

*gambling with diamonds*
